questions.question: Write the OpenMP directive to divide the iterations into chunks containing 2 iterations in a program that calculates the sum of elements in an array.
questions.hint: omp parallel for (chunkSize=2) - Note: You need to declare the array before the parallel for loop

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of using OpenMP to divide iterations into chunks in a parallel computing program?
Write a simple OpenMP program that calculates the sum of elements in an array of size 1000, dividing the iterations into chunks containing 2 iterations.
questions.hint: omp parallel for (chunkSize=2) { ... } - Make sure to include the main() function and proper array declaration
